{"query":"INSERT INTO produktionsAnlagenConfig (intTp_ID,unt_ID, mst_ID,prd_id,anl_id,anl_col,startDate,endDate,startWeek,endWeek,ending,note,einheitControlSys,iBdeType,mstIMw,min_val,max_val) VALUES ('3', '2', '144', '' , '' , '' , '2021-01', '', '','', '1', '','2' , '2','Test 872 1M','10','60') "}
